blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
